task_completion.description: Verify the event subject is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'GreenLeaf IoT Pilot Kickoff Meeting' in the Subject or Event Name field.

task_completion.description: Verify the activity type and status are correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Activity Type set to 'Meeting' and Status set to 'Planned' in the event details or form.

task_completion.description: Verify the start and end dates and times are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Start Date '2026-03-05', Start Time '10:00 AM', End Date '2026-03-05', and End Time '11:30 AM' in the respective date/time fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the event location is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Video Conference - Microsoft Teams' in the Location field.

task_completion.description: Verify the event description contains the required agenda.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the specific text starting with 'Kickoff meeting for IoT sensor deployment pilot...' and including the 4-point agenda in the Description text area.

task_completion.description: Verify the event was successfully saved in the CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the saved event details view (read-only mode), a success confirmation message, or the event appearing on the Vtiger CRM calendar view. It should not just be an unsaved form.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vtiger CRM application, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to create the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows or script executions visible that directly insert the event into the database or via API.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually saved the event rather than just typing the details and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots must show the post-save state (e.g., the detail view of the created event or the calendar grid showing the event), proving the 'Save' button was clicked and processed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Event Details: Subject: 'GreenLeaf IoT Pilot Kickoff Meeting', Type: 'Meeting', Start Date: '2026-03-05', Start Time: '10:00' (or 10:00 AM), End Date: '2026-03-05', End Time: '11:30' (or 11:30 AM), Status: 'Planned', Location: 'Video Conference - Microsoft Teams', Description must include the 4-point agenda regarding the GreenLeaf Manufacturing Detroit plant.
